title: Saranae Love You
original_title: สาระแน เลิฟยูวว
overview: Rang and Peng, Two of the most ruthless criminals break out of a high-security jail to recover the "September's Diamond" which was lost to them when they were caught. They also tried to avenge the people who secretly stole the diamond from them.
